horoscope: You could feel blocked from pursuing your desires in spots today, dear Aries, but you can also be motivated to work a little harder toward your goals. It's a good time for making fortunate contacts through media, the phone, transit, or studies. You're learning a lot of useful things these days, and while you may not be putting your skills to productive use just yet, this is a critical time for skill development and gaining knowledge that will serve you well down the road. There can be some tension today related to work, business, or money that can interfere with your desire to socialize and enjoy easygoing times, but there's a natural need to detach yourself temporarily from situations that have recently added stress or pressure to your life. You're in a cycle that finds you often excited about and motivated to take care of your valuables and finances. Still, it's also an active period for building confidence in your own worth or value. You get the chance to tackle self-esteem issues with self-honesty.

You may be struggling with a fear of missing out when you apply your energies to the tasks at hand today, dear Taurus. Indeed, your responsibilities and reputation are special concerns with the Moon at the top of your solar chart. However, it clashes with Mars, which is currently transiting your sign and will continue to fire you up until June 28th. Mars brings out the fire in your personality, your desire to innovate, and your dynamism, and it's probably the perfect time for you to explore your desires. But today's Moon encourages you to take care of your future. Finding a balance makes the most sense. If you can focus your energies and find a compromise today, you can find yourself pleasantly ambitious. It's a fine time to gain a better perspective or handle on money matters as well.

There's some tendency to be too quick on the trigger in your communications today, dear Gemini, with the Moon square Mars today. This is more likely if you're juggling too many things. Consider whether you need a break from certain activities or from information overload. If you can moderate yourself today, you'll find it a strong time to set goals. In fact, you can feel directed, motivated, and organized. Relationships may feel a little stronger once past the tendency for some impatience. The Moon in your spirit sector all day stirs your instincts to explore, discover, and question. Downtime is vital this month with Mars in your privacy sector, but you need a change of pace, too, especially with something to engage your mind and refresh your spirit.

There can be some tension if someone brings up an issue that leaves you feeling insecure or if you're left to fill in the blanks today, dear Cancer. Some guarding of your feelings is often wise, but it's best to avoid jumping to conclusions today because, with a Moon-Mars aspect, it's all too easy to take things more personally than is warranted. You can be a little secretive or protective of your plans and feelings today as the Moon transits your solar eighth house, and you likely need to gather up your energy and think more carefully before going forward with important projects. It can become apparent that rushing things doesn’t get you very far today. Fortunately, you can draw on your experience and wisdom to make gains in business or reputation matters. Certainly, others may be more demanding of you, but it can also be an animated time for your social life.

You can find it rather difficult to reach a compromise today, dear Leo. Instead, you might strategically concentrate on what you can change. Even so, with the Moon in your partnership sector all day, you're especially interested in finding a balance or keeping the peace, so it can grate on your nerves if something's out of line. You might feel temporarily overwhelmed by career matters or responsibilities, but you also have a hard time pulling yourself away! However, the day also brings a sense of forward motion. The desire now is to feel alive and vital, which you might accomplish through other special people. You benefit from the involvement or company of others, even if you are pursuing your own goals.

You're geared up to roll up your sleeves and take care of problem areas today, dear Virgo. However, there can be a tendency to rush things or succumb to pressure to get far too much done in a short period. Additionally, a difference of opinion could break your concentration. It can be challenging to focus at times, but when you can, you're really ready to get things done. Breaking out of a rut is an active theme now, and today is no exception. You can rally the support you need, particularly from higher-ups or from people with whom you do business. Benefits come from investigation or research.

You could feel torn between applying yourself to an absorbing pursuit and enjoying some free time today, dear Libra. It's generally a time of intensity within you or in a close relationship, as Mars stirs things up in your solar eighth house. A lot is going on behind the scenes, but today's Moon invites you to lighten things up for now. You might waver between trusting someone or something on the one hand and questioning motives on the other. Signals can get crossed in love matters, leading both parties to feel moody. However, today also holds good energy for enjoying some meaningful leisure time. A relationship may be motivating you to better yourself or do your best today.

You’re prioritizing your emotional needs today, dear Scorpio, with the Moon in your solar fourth house all day. You might focus on restoring your energy at this time of the lunar month. With the Moon's square to Mars today, there can be some frustrations in your interactions that distract you from this mission temporarily! However, if you use this energy positively, feeling frustrated with your situation can light a fire under you to get things sorted out. In fact, with Mars in your opposite sign these days, relationships can challenge you, which can feel helpful or disruptive, and possibly a bit of both! Today is good for practical cleverness and gaining an advantage in your work.

It may be difficult to divide your time with an interest in both personal pursuits and duties today, dear Sagittarius, but it’s best not to overdo. It’s all too easy to feel stressed, and part of this could be information overload. However, once you can tune out some of the extras, you're in good shape for both practicality and intuition working for you. It's a strong time to apply yourself to creative projects, or to bring a creative touch to your regular work or routines. This is also a good day for communicating effectively with a partner or good friend.

With the Moon in your resources sector all day, dear Capricorn, you're seeking out a nice dose of predictability. There can be some interference to navigate on this front, however, with a Moon-Mars square, whether it's because a lot is going on around you or because you're dealing with a fear of missing out. Sensitivity to your money situation or sense of security can cause some tension. There is a tendency for people to make more of an issue than is warranted, and exaggeration leads to mistakes or frustration. It can be challenging to get everything in order, but if you can focus on centering yourself, it's a fine time to take charge of your personal and domestic life. Certainly, you're more aware of those things that ground you, make you feel secure, and keep you focused on the moment. Efforts to simplify can be rewarding.

The Moon spends today in your sign, dear Aquarius, sparking a personal approach to your day. With Mars in your solar fourth house these days, there can be more activity in your domestic world, and while it's excellent for pushing a family or home-related matter forward, it does require some adjustments to your general approach to pursuing your desires in other areas of life. This theme is stronger today with a Moon-Mars square. If tensions have been brewing, this is a time when confrontations are possible and problems are brought to the surface. Obstacles can also serve to motivate you. There can be some tendency to rush things in spots today, and it makes sense to tune out distractions as much as possible to focus on something important to you.

With the Moon in your solar twelfth house all day, you’re a little less accessible as you turn your energies inward and reorient yourself, dear Pisces. Mars has been animating your communication sector these days, however, and you're ahead of the pack with your ideas, and you're asserting yourself more directly or courageously. It's a busy time, making it a bit challenging to pull yourself away today. Something communicated can frustrate you today as the Moon and Mars form a square. Aim to let go of tension over personal viewpoints. As you center yourself, the day is strong for connecting with your feelings and staying very much anchored in the present.
